COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING, WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Vacated

Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents
Off Calendar Jan-16-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT OLIVIA OCTAVIANI'S Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents.

Defendant Olivia Octaviani's motion to deem admitted requests for admission is granted and her request for monetary sanctions is denied. Defendant has shown good cause for her requests for admission be deemed admitted and plaintiff has not filed any opposition to this motion. Defendant's request for monetary sanctions is unsupported by any evidence of the cost incurred to file this motion.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Set For Trial On Apr-27-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT OLIVIA OCTAVIANI's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Olivia Octaviani's unopposed motion to set aside the default and default judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling, with a cover letter reflecting compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
